task_summary: Three patch fixes: UNCLEAR handler for analyze-bug, cross-stack Playwright detection in scaffolder, and grep fragility in scaffold tests.
constraints: Pure markdown plugin — no runtime code changes
Must not change Automation Config contract (patch version)
Test assertions must be Batch-specific (not match across batches)
Block Comment Template format must be used for UNCLEAR handler
All three fixes are independent and can be executed in any order
success_criteria: analyze-bug SKILL.md has UNCLEAR handler that posts block comment to tracker
fix-bugs SKILL.md explicitly handles UNCLEAR path with block comment
scaffolder.md Batch 7 detects Playwright via package.json, pyproject.toml, and Gemfile
scaffolder.md Batch 7 generates language-appropriate test files (.spec.ts, test_smoke.py, smoke_spec.rb)
scaffolder-e2e-batch.sh uses context-aware grep patterns (Batch-specific line ranges)
scaffolder-e2e-batch.sh file count assertion uses 'up to 27' not bare '27'
skip_rationale: All three fixes are precisely specified in roadmap.md with exact file paths, problem descriptions, and solutions. Composite complexity 2, confidence 1.0. No research, brainstorming, or specification needed.

destructive_ops.evidence: Pure markdown file edits only — no deletion, truncation, or overwrite of data

credential_handling.evidence: No credentials, secrets, API keys, or tokens involved in any of the three fixes

irreversible_side_effects.evidence: No external actions — all changes are local markdown file edits reversible via git

elevated_privileges.evidence: No system privileges needed — standard file editing in user-owned repository

ambiguous_scope.evidence: Scope is precisely defined: 4 specific files listed in roadmap with exact change descriptions

network_irreversibility.evidence: No DNS, CDN, firewall, or network configuration changes in any fix

supply_chain_ops.evidence: No package publishing, registry operations, or container pushes involved

billing_quota_ops.evidence: No cloud provisioning, quota changes, or billing modifications

system_service_effects.evidence: No systemd, cron, Docker daemon, or OS service modifications
